sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n70737" key="nhrito/muqos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">νηρῐτόμῡθος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n70737.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <xr opt="n" TEIform="xr"> <lbl opt="n" TEIform="lbl">=</lbl> <ref targOrder="U" lang="greek" TEIform="ref">πολύμυθος</ref></xr>, Id.</sense> </entryFree>
